title: Mivoca Response
description: Captures a single participant response to a question during a voice elicitation session. Includes the raw and structured answer, precise timing telemetry, and quality flags for satisficing detection.

response_id.description: Unique identifier for this response record.

session_id.description: Identifier of the interview session this response belongs to.

question_id.description: Identifier of the question being answered, matching a question_id in the question bank.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the response was submitted.

value.description: The primary response value. Type depends on question type: number for Likert/scales, string for open-ended/select, null if skipped.

raw_text.description: Free-text content of the response for open-ended, writing sample, and process narration questions. Null for closed-ended types.

selected_options.description: Array of selected option values for select and select_multiple question types. Null for non-select types.

scale_value.description: Numeric scale position for Likert and rating-scale responses. Null for non-scale types.

semantic_differential_value.description: Position on a semantic differential scale (typically 1.0-7.0) for bipolar adjective pair questions. Null for other types.

timing.description: Precise timing telemetry for the response, enabling engagement analysis and satisficing detection.

displayed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the question was first displayed to the participant.

first_interaction_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the participant's first interaction with the question (click, keypress, etc.).

submitted_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the participant submitted their response.

duration_ms.description: Total time in milliseconds from question display to response submission.

probe_of.description: If this response is a follow-up probe elicited by the interviewer, this field contains the question_id of the parent question that triggered the probe. Null or absent for primary responses.

probe_prompt.description: The follow-up question the interviewer asked to elicit this probe response. Null or absent for primary responses.

probe_index.description: Sequential index of this probe within the parent question's probe chain (1-based). Null or absent for primary responses.

quality_flags.description: Automated quality indicators for detecting low-effort or patterned responding.

too_fast.description: True if the response duration was below the minimum threshold for the question type, suggesting the participant did not fully engage.

straightline_sequence.description: Count of consecutive identical responses ending with this one. A high value suggests straightlining (selecting the same answer repeatedly without reading).

changed_answer.description: True if the participant changed their initial selection before submitting, indicating deliberation.
